mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CHAT_MSG_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CHAT_MSG ( CHAT_MSG_NO, CHAT_ROOM_NO, SENDER_NO, CHAT_CONTENT, READ_YN, SEND_DT ) VALUES ( #{chatMsgNo}, #{chatRoomNo}, #{senderNo}, #{chatContent}, 'N', SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT CHAT_MSG_NO, CHAT_ROOM_NO, SENDER_NO, CHAT_CONTENT, READ_YN, TO_CHAR(SEND_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS SEND_DT FROM CHAT_MESSAGE WHERE CHAT_ROOM_NO = #{chatRoomNo} ORDER BY CHAT_MSG_NO ASC
